[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 077/26
200600 UTC APR
POLISH NAV WARN 077/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. POLISH COAST
DUE TO MILITARY EXERCISES ZONE IS CLOSED FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY:
S-6 CENTERED 54-39.27N 016-36.59E
BETWEEN 20 APR AND 25 APR
FROM 06:00 TO 21:59
ZONE IS CLOSED
CANCEL THIS MSG 252159 UTC APR
